label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20

extraction.one_line_summary: KARAPAS Richard won stage 20 with solo plateau finish move, holding 11-second gap over chasing GC group that refused to cooperate.
tactical_patterns: GC group closed gap to 11 seconds but refused coordinated chase as contenders wouldn't work for each other.
KARAPAS attacked on plateau finale collecting KOM points while simultaneously securing stage, dual-purpose aggression.
STANARD Rob collected early KOM points in breakaway threatening KARAPAS's polka dot despite not being classification contender.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: secured Vuelta victory by two minutes five seconds, emotional finish suggests relief at surviving mountain attacks
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: attacks constantly neutralized by rivals in GC group unwilling to cooperate, tactical isolation cost podium threat
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: mentioned struggling on final mountain suggesting form collapse in final week
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: negative: dropped significantly on penultimate stage falling to seventh overall, late-race collapse pattern
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: finished in front group but showed no attacking intent suggesting protected podium position
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: secured third overall by finishing with GC group despite attacks from LOPEZ Miguel Angel
